use_cases: Hero sections for SaaS landing pages requiring visual impact
Product showcases needing ambient animated backgrounds
Feature section overlays for media and entertainment sites
E-commerce landing pages with immersive visual experiences
Portfolio and creative agency sites with artistic backgrounds
ai_summary: A full-screen animated aurora background component featuring pulsing radial gradients, blurred color blobs, and smooth opacity transitions. Built with Framer Motion for fluid animations and supports customizable star count, gradient colors via CSS variables, and adjustable pulse duration. Suitable for dark-themed landing pages and hero sections where ambient visual effects enhance brand presence.
